name: Plaza Jewelry Pawn Shop
description_short: Plaza Jewelry Pawn Shop buys and loans against jewelry and valuables at their Baltimore location. Open weekdays with extended hours Monday-Thursday.
description_long:
Plaza Jewelry Pawn Shop operates as a traditional pawn shop located at 4125 Patterson Ave in Baltimore, Maryland 21215. The business is reachable at (410) 358-0775 and maintains an online presence through their website ydavidjewelers.com, suggesting a connection to jewelry retail operations. The shop appears to specialize in jewelry-related transactions, consistent with their name and online branding as "Y David Jewelers."

Based on available information, Plaza Jewelry Pawn Shop offers collateral-based lending services typical of pawn operations, accepting jewelry and other valuables as collateral for short-term loans. They also appear to engage in the purchase and resale of jewelry items. The business model allows customers to obtain quick cash by pawning items or selling jewelry outright without the credit checks required by traditional lenders.

The shop distinguishes itself through a jewelry-focused specialization rather than general merchandise pawning. Their website branding under "Y David Jewelers" suggests expertise and potentially higher-value transaction handling in the jewelry category. Operating hours indicate they maintain consistent availability during standard business days, with Monday through Thursday extending to 6:30 PM, accommodating working customers.

As with all pawn shops, customers should understand that pawning items means risking loss of personal property if loans are not repaid, and redemption terms should be clearly understood before transactions. The lack of detailed service information on the available website content limits full transparency about interest rates, loan terms, and specific policies.
pros: Conveniently located at 4125 Patterson Ave in Baltimore with accessible phone contact (410) 358-0775
Extended weekday hours Monday-Thursday until 6:30 PM for working customers
Jewelry specialization suggests expertise in evaluating and handling high-value items
No credit check required for obtaining quick cash through collateral-based loans
Online web presence through ydavidjewelers.com for additional information
Immediate cash transactions without lengthy approval processes
cons: Limited operational hours on Friday (11:30 AM - 5:00 PM) and no weekend hours mentioned
Risk of permanent loss of personal jewelry and valuables if loans cannot be repaid
No transparent pricing, interest rates, or loan terms visible on available website information
Pawn loans typically carry higher interest rates than traditional bank loans
Minimal online information available about specific services, policies, or customer protections
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash without credit checks or approval processes
People with valuable jewelry seeking to sell items quickly at fair market value
Short-term borrowers willing to use personal items as collateral for temporary loans
diagnosis: Plaza Jewelry Pawn Shop is best for individuals needing fast cash against jewelry valuables without credit approval, or those looking to sell jewelry items quickly. Critical caveat: pawn loans risk permanent loss of personal property if not repaid on time, and interest rates and specific terms are not transparently disclosed online—customers must visit or call to understand exact costs and redemption requirements.
services: Short-term cash loans secured by valuables
